alert: Long-running API requests are being disconnected at the edge.
root_cause: load balancer idle timeout too low

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:load_balancer: Load balancer logs show edge connection resets at the idle timeout.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:load_balancer: Load balancer metrics show elevated connection reset rate.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:load_balancer:IDLE_TIMEOU: IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS is set below expected request duration.

logs: INFO request_id=410 path=/api/reporting completed status=200 latency_ms=42000

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(load balancer idle timeout too low, increase load balancer idle timeout)
distractors: Web requests complete successfully; the disconnect happens at the edge.
